text: To prepare a completely amputated part of the body for transportation to hospital with the casualty, you should:

options.text: Place it in a clean plastic bag filled with cold water.
Wrap it in clean, moist dressings and keep it cool.
Wash it off and place it into a bag of crushed ice.
Wrap it in clean, moist dressings and keep it at body temperature.

explanation: To preserve an amputated part, it should be wrapped in sterile, moist gauze or dressings, placed in a sealed plastic bag, and then placed in a container with cold water or a cooling pack. It should never be placed directly on ice, as this causes frostbite damage.
